title: Agent Evidence SE Workflow Case Prototype v0.1.0-rc3
description: Representative reproducible software engineering workflow fixtures for operation-accountability profile validation. This release candidate includes three SE workflow case prototypes, controlled invalid variants, baseline comparison outputs, reports, and reproducibility materials. It does not claim industrial real-world evaluation, production deployment, benchmark superiority, legal or compliance sufficiency, full FDO interoperability, or TSE v3 readiness.
